title: MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key - Overview

detail.title: MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key - Overview
detail.short_info: MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key is out. Download official answer key and response sheet at cetcell.mahacet.org, check scores, and file objections online.

content.text: MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key is now available on the official website of the Maharashtra State Common Entrance Test Cell, and candidates can download it by logging in at cetcell.mahacet.org through the Objection Tracking section under PG - MBA/MMS.

sections.heading: MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key - Overview

content.text: The Maharashtra State CET Cell has released the provisional answer key and response sheet for the MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt in online mode only. Candidates who appeared in the second attempt can now verify the official correct responses, compare them with their answers, and estimate their probable score before the declaration of results.

rows: State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra
Provisional Answer Key and Response Sheet Released
To check correct responses, calculate expected score, and raise objections

sections.heading: Direct Link to MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key

content.text: The MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt answer key and response sheet are available exclusively on the official CET Cell portal. To access them, candidates must log in using their registered credentials.

items: Official website: Click Here
Section: Candidate Registration AY 2026-2027
Module: Objection Tracking
Option: PG - MBA/MMS (MAH MBA/MMS CET 2026)

content.text: Once logged in, candidates can click on the answer key/response sheet link for the second attempt and download the file in PDF format for detailed analysis.

sections.heading: How to Download MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key

content.text: Step-by-Step Process
Follow the steps below to download the MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt answer key and response sheet:

items: Visit the official website of the Maharashtra State CET Cell at cetcell.mahacet.org.
On the homepage, click on “Candidate Registration AY Examination 2026-2027” or the relevant candidate login link.
Enter your Application Number, Password, or other login credentials as required and sign in to the portal.
After logging in, go to the “Objection Tracking” section in your dashboard.
Select “PG - MBA/MMS” to open the MAH MBA CET 2026 module.
Look for the link titled “Answer Key / Response Sheet” for the second attempt and click on it.
Download the answer key/response sheet PDF and save it for reference and score calculation.

content.text: Candidates are advised to check their internet connection and keep their login details handy while accessing the portal to avoid any last-minute issues.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in the Answer Key and Response Sheet

content.text: The MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt answer key and response sheet generally contain all the information required for candidates to cross-check their performance:

items: Candidate details such as name, roll number/registration number
Exam date, shift, and slot information
Question IDs for each question asked in the exam
Correct option IDs as decided by CET Cell
Candidate’s marked responses for each question
Status of responses (correct, incorrect, or not attempted)

content.text: By carefully comparing their marked responses with the official correct options, candidates can identify questions they got right or wrong and estimate their raw score.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Your Expected Score

content.text: Marking Scheme for MAH MBA CET 2026
MAH MBA CET 2026 follows a straightforward marking scheme, which makes score calculation easy for candidates:

items: Each correct answer carries 1 mark.
There is no negative marking for incorrect answers.
No marks are awarded or deducted for unanswered questions.

content.text: Example of Score Calculation
To calculate your expected score:

items: Step 1: Count the total number of questions where your response matches the official correct option.
Step 2: Multiply this number by 1 (since each correct answer carries 1 mark).
Step 3: The resulting value is your estimated raw score in MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt.

content.text: Once normalization and percentile calculations are applied (as per CET Cell’s final process), this raw score will be converted into a percentile score for merit and admission purposes.

sections.heading: How to Raise Objections Against the Answer Key

content.text: Online Objection Process
If a candidate finds any discrepancy in the provisional answer key of MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt, they can raise objections within the specified timeline.
The typical steps to challenge the answer key are:

items: Log in to the candidate portal using your credentials on the official website.
Navigate to the “Objection Tracking” section from your dashboard.
Choose “PG - MBA/MMS” to access the MAH MBA CET 2026 answer key interface.
Select the question for which you want to raise an objection by using the Question ID.
Enter your suggested correct option and provide a clear, concise academic justification.
Upload supporting documents (such as screenshots or extracts from standard textbooks, study material, or official sources) if the portal allows attachments.
Pay the objection fee per question, if mandated, using the available online payment methods.
Submit the objection and note down the reference or acknowledgement number for future tracking.

content.text: Candidates should raise objections only for questions where they have strong evidence to support their claim, as authorities review each objection carefully before finalizing the answer key.

sections.heading: First Attempt vs Second Attempt Answer Key - Important Notes

content.text: MAH MBA CET 2026 has been conducted in multiple sessions and attempts to accommodate candidates. The first attempt answer key and response sheet were released earlier, and now a separate answer key is made available for the second attempt.

items: Candidates who appeared in the second attempt must check only the answer key corresponding to their attempt and date.
The CET Cell will consider all valid attempts and corresponding final answer keys while preparing the final merit list and result.
Differences, if any, between the first and second attempt keys are handled at the normalization and result preparation stage by the authorities.

content.text: Candidates should therefore focus on their own attempt’s answer key and use it for accurate self-assessment.

sections.heading: Result and Next Steps After Answer Key

content.text: Once the objection window closes and the CET Cell finalizes the answer key, the MAH MBA CET 2026 result is published on the official website.
Typical next steps include:

items: Declaration of final answer key and individual scorecards
Publication of MAH MBA CET 2026 result and percentile scores
Release of detailed notification for the Centralised Admission Process (CAP) for MBA/MMS
Registration for CAP rounds, document verification, and option form filling
Allocation of seats in government, aided, university-managed, and private/self-financed MBA/MMS institutes in Maharashtra

content.text: Candidates must regularly visit cetcell.mahacet.org and monitor official notifications so that they do not miss deadlines related to CAP and admission processes.

sections.heading: Who Can Access MAH MBA CET 2026 Second Attempt Answer Key

content.text: The answer key and response sheet are restricted to genuine candidates of the exam:

items: Only those who registered and appeared for the MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt can access the answer key through their login.
New users cannot create a fresh login solely to view answer keys.
Candidates must use the same Application Number, Password, or login credentials that they used during registration and examination.

content.text: If a candidate forgets their password or login details, they should use the “Forgot Password” or similar options available on the portal to recover access.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates

content.text: To get maximum benefit from the MAH MBA CET 2026 second attempt answer key:

items: Download and save your answer key and response sheet immediately after accessing them, as the links may be disabled after the objection window closes.
Cross-check each section (Logical Reasoning, Abstract Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, Verbal Ability/Reading Comprehension) systematically to avoid missing any questions.
Raise objections only where you are reasonably sure that the official key is incorrect and you have academic proof or standard references to support your claim.
Keep copies of your objections, receipts of fee payment (if applicable), and any supporting documents for your records.
Use the estimated score to plan your target colleges and prepare in advance for CAP rounds, document preparation, and counselling.
